examples.title: Algorithm: Morphological Opening
examples.description: Pseudocode demonstrating the morphological opening operation
examples.code:
ALGORITHM MorphologicalOpening
INPUT: Image A, Structuring Element B
OUTPUT: Opened Image

BEGIN
 ErodedImage = Erosion(A, B)
 OpenedImage = Dilation(ErodedImage, B)
 RETURN OpenedImage
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode defines the morphological opening operation as an erosion followed by a dilation.

examples.title: Python: Morphological Opening
examples.description: Python implementation of the morphological opening operation using OpenCV
examples.code:
import cv2
import numpy as np

# Define the structuring element (a 3x3 square)
kernel = np.ones((3, 3), np.uint8)

# Load the image
img = cv2.imread('image.png', cv2.IMREAD_GRAYSCALE)

# Apply morphological opening
opened_img = cv2.morphologyEx(img, cv2.MORPH_OPEN, kernel)

# Display the result
cv2.imshow('Opened Image', opened_img)
cv2.waitKey(0)
cv2.destroyAllWindows()
examples.explanation: This Python code uses OpenCV to load an image, apply morphological opening, and display the result.
